---
title: "ceremony.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/node/ceremony.ts"
loc: 180
complexity: 29
logic_score: 1.90
style_score: 3.81
intel_score: 3.56
overall_score: 3.09
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix. It exists to support the broader ecosystem of system telemetry. Its role in the system is to provide foundational operational logic.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 1.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.6/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 3 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [ChalkInstance](file://chalk)
- [*](file://node:fs)
- [join](file://node:path)
- [fileURLToPath](file://node:url)
- [activePersona](file://../tools/pennyone/personaRegistry.js)

### Exports
- `__dirname`
- `PROJECT_ROOT`
- `THEMES`
- `sleep`
- `getStatusColor`
- `getRavensStatus`
- `pidPath`
- `pid`
- `getPerimeterStatus`
- `reportPath`
- `report`
- `results`
- `getPennyOneStatus`
- `statsPath`
- `getForgeStatus`
- `wardenPath`
- `getFishtestStatus`
- `dataPath`
- `getWardenStatus`
- `statePath`
- `state`
- `getVaultStatus`
- `vaultDir`
- `masterKey`
- `secretsBin`
- `runStartupCeremony`
- `runStartupCeremony`
- `persona`
- `theme`
- `theme`
- `width`
- `bar`
- `tLen`
- `pad`
- `gPad`
- `ravens`
- `forge`
- `fishtest`
- `warden`
- `vault`
- `perimeter`
- `pennyone`
- `vault`
- `mind`
